v1_1_phase: W2 master task list commit + 23 task specs batch + lane_dispatch system. Lane_01 self-approve under AMD_LANE01_CTO_AUTO_APPROVE_TECH_NON_CANON §3.1 YES list — task spec authoring + workflow YAML + python script + pytest tests are tech non-canon. Enables 3-Lane parallel queue-based execution to v1.0 GA with only 3 NTS approval gates remaining.
scope: Commit roadmaps/MASTER_TASK_LIST_V1.1.md (rename from V1_1) + author 23 task specs (10 Lane_01 + 5 Lane_02 + 8 Lane_03) + 3 lane queue files (network/task_queues/Lane_NN.md) + lane_dispatch.yml workflow_dispatch + scripts/runtime/lane_dispatch.py + 8 pytest tests. CRITICAL: workflow does NOT execute task — only dispatches task spec to operator.

phases.A: Rename MASTER_TASK_LIST_V1_1.md → MASTER_TASK_LIST_V1.1.md; validate 12 sections; SHARED_INDEX +row pointing master task list; runtime/current_state.md §1 Phase reference
phases.B: Author 23 task specs (.md files, ~100-200 lines each) with structure: TASK_ID + LANE + DEPENDS_ON + SCOPE + INHERITANCE + PARALLEL SAFETY + 3-5 PHASES + 8-12 ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA + BOUNDARY + EXECUTION ORDER + POST-TASK. 10 Lane_01 W2-W5 + 5 Lane_02 W3-W5 + 8 Lane_03 W3-W5
phases.C: network/task_queues/Lane_{01,02,03}.md (3 queue tables: Order/Task ID/Status/Depends On/Phase/NTS_GATE; status enum PENDING/READY/RUNNING/DONE/FAILED/BLOCKED); update auto_project_status.yml paths + sync_runtime_to_public.yml mirror + SHARED_INDEX
phases.D: .github/workflows/lane_dispatch.yml workflow_dispatch only (R-RUN-01..06; inputs lane_id + task_id optional + auto_chain bool default false); scripts/runtime/lane_dispatch.py (~250 lines: read_queue + find_next_ready + load_task_spec + mark_done + update_dependent_tasks; modes --pick-next / --mark-done / --status / --self-test); tests/test_lane_dispatch.py 8 pytest tests; pytest 88 → 96+
phases.E: Local --pick-next test for 3 lanes; workflow_dispatch test; e2e simulation (mark T5 DONE → re-run → next task)

parallel_safety.lane_3_active: Lane_03 may run canon hygiene work — different folder
parallel_safety.lane_2_active: Lane_02 may run W2 hygiene tasks — different folder
parallel_safety.verdict: PARALLEL SAFE — Lane_01 owns task_specs/ + network/task_queues/ + scripts/runtime/lane_dispatch.py + .github/workflows/lane_dispatch.yml + tests/test_lane_dispatch.py — none touched by Lane_02/03. Risk: NOTIFICATION_LEDGER + AMENDMENTS_LOG + MASTER_CHECKLIST + current_state.md may have concurrent edits (rebase + manual conflict resolution per W2.T4/T5 pattern).
parallel_safety.conflict_protocol: git pull --rebase before final commit; NOTIFICATION_LEDGER NTF id reservation +1 from latest seen

expected_deliverables: docs/LAW_CLA_LLM/SHARED/SHARED_INDEX.md (UPDATED +master task list ref + task_queues section)
